text:
Here goes:

As the sun set through the trees I set down my cuppa and wandered off for a walk.

I took a nice long stroll along the creek, stopping occasionally to drink some more coffee.

I found a nice shady spot and sprawled out. I plopped down onto the soft grass.

I was quiet a while, just enjoying the tranquility. Eventually, I heard something rustling nearby.

"What the heck!" I yelled. "Oh no!

It's a big owl! Who's-a-big owl?

I crept quietly toward the owl.

It was just a garden cat.

How did you know it was the owl? You look like an owl. Are you sure it's not just a cat?

It's pretty clear now.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
